$comment: Single source of truth for tier classification, file caps, and budgets. Read by measure-tokens.js. Phase 0 ships in observe-only mode (enforce_caps: false). Phase 2f flips enforce to true.
$comment_caps: Caps reflect realistic floors with 12 months of memory. Tier 1 is dominated by user content (personality, integrations, INDEX descriptions). Framework files (CLAUDE.md, capture-rules, manifest) are aggressively trimmed; further cuts would lose findability. Original baseline before optimization: 8,278 tokens / 463 lines. Tier 1 was tightened to 5,800 in the 2026-04-29 token-optimization PR; raised to 7,500 on 2026-04-30 (organic memory growth + A3 session-block overhead); raised to 7,800 on 2026-04-30 (autonomy roadmap Ship 1) to absorb Action-states + Conversational-tics rules. Raised again 2026-05-01 (wiki-graph: split profile/people.md and service-providers.md into per-entity pages, expanding INDEX rows). 2026-05-02: +100 to absorb migration 0022 path rename (ops/ -> runtime/, ~+1 token per occurrence in path-heavy Tier 1 files). 2026-05-02: tier1 10300 -> 10800 / cache-stable 9400 -> 9800 to absorb densify-wiki Phase 1 ENTITIES.md growth (27 -> 36 entities + 4 service-provider stubs + Google/Vercel/Anthropic/HostMind), with ~400 tokens headroom for further organic growth. 2026-05-02 (v5.0.0): folded the former AGENTS.md into CLAUDE.md (single canonical instruction file); cap raised 90 -> 120 to absorb new 'Claude Code specifics' section (skills/MCPs/sub-agents prose) with growth headroom. 2026-05-02 (artifacts cleanup): cache-stable 9800 -> 9825, tier1_max_lines 510 -> 511 to absorb 'artifacts/' -> 'user-data/artifacts/' path correction in Artifacts rule (root artifacts/ removed; everything now under user-data/). 2026-05-02 (backup move + path-fix sweep): tier1 10800 -> 11000, cache-stable 9825 -> 10025, tier1_max_lines 511 -> 520 to absorb organic Tier 1 growth (integrations.md/ENTITIES.md) plus the 'artifacts/' -> 'user-data/artifacts/' path corrections in integrations.md and other in-context files. 2026-05-02 (claude-response-latency design): tier1 11000 -> 13500 / cache-stable 10025 -> 12200 / lines 520 -> 600 / user-data INDEX cap 90 -> 115. Absorbs (a) the new 'Where to look first' routing block in INDEX.md (~250-400 tokens, ~13 lines), (b) the CLAUDE.md Recall rule amendment (~70 tokens), and (c) accumulated organic memory growth that pushed actual Tier 1 to ~12,650 even before this PR's adds. ~850 tokens of headroom for further growth before the next bump. Revisit when Tier 1 baseline drifts past 7,000. 2026-05-02 (cleanup pass): per_protocol_max_tokens 4600 -> 4800 to absorb dream.md organic growth (currently 4633; cap was failing tests). ~167 tokens of headroom; revisit if dream.md crosses 4700. 2026-05-03 (Phase 1b Tier 1 trim): tier1 13500 -> 12000 / cache-stable 12200 -> 10500 / lines 620 -> 550 / INDEX cap 150 -> 110 / hot cap 60 -> 50. Drivers: (a) integrations.md split into integrations.md (55L) + integrations-setup.md (46L); setup details no longer Tier-1-loaded. (b) Sub-INDEX folding for whoop/projects/linear-ISE/sports-nhl/spotify/youtube/github/self-improvement clusters in INDEX.md (127L -> 99L). Actual post-trim: 532 lines / 11,499 tokens / 10,153 cache-stable. ~500 tokens token-cap headroom, ~18 lines line-cap headroom, ~350 tokens cache-stable headroom. Revisit when actual Tier 1 token total drifts past 11,500 again. 2026-05-03 (Phase 2 CLAUDE.md dispatch amendment): +6 lines / +241 tokens / +241 cache-stable from the Protocols dispatch description. Caps bumped 550→560 / 12000→12200 / 10500→10700 to maintain safe headroom (cache-stable was at 10,394/10,500 = 106 tokens, too tight for organic growth). Post-bump: ~22 lines / ~460 tokens / ~306 tokens of headroom. 2026-05-03 (user-data organic growth): cache-stable 10700→10800 to absorb 30-token overrun from natural memory growth across user-data Tier 1 (INDEX.md, ENTITIES.md, personality.md). Actual cache-stable post-bump: 10,730/10,800 = ~70 tokens headroom. Tier 1 total 12,015/12,200 still has ~185 tokens of headroom and was not bumped. Revisit when cache-stable drifts past 10,750. 2026-05-03 (learning-queue activation thread #5): tier1 12300→12500 / cache-stable 10950→11050 / lines 560→565 to absorb (a) CLAUDE.md startup #4 today.md path append (~28 tokens), (b) operational-rules learning-queue line (~70 tokens), (c) migration 0027 backfilling `qid:` on each learning-queue.md entry (+~109 tokens organic growth). Today.md itself is per-day volatile; loaded-when-present means its tokens don't always count, but the worst-case path needs to fit. Post-bump: ~65 tokens of token-cap headroom, ~75 cache-stable headroom. Threads #3 and #4 will also append to startup #4 (needs-your-input.md) — they may need a further small bump.

tier1_files.$comment: Single canonical instruction file (v5.0.0 fold of former AGENTS.md). Cap 120 = current ~90 lines + ~30 headroom for Claude Code specifics growth (skills/MCPs/sub-agents prose).
Cap 110 (Phase 1b): folded whoop/projects/linear-ISE/sports-nhl/spotify/youtube/github/self-improvement clusters into per-topic sub-INDEXes. File at 99 lines post-trim (was 127). ~11 lines headroom.

Auto-generated entity index for fast recall lookup; capped at ~150 rows in lib/entity-index.js writeEntitiesAtomic. Loaded right after INDEX.md so both daily-Dream-regenerated files invalidate together.
Cap tightened 60 → 50 (Phase 1b). Files typically far under cap.
Cap 60: migration 0014 seeds 6 starter questions (~43 lines incl. frontmatter). Headroom for 2-3 organically-promoted questions before alerting.
Per-day question Dream picks. Absent when queue is empty. Loaded LAST in startup #4 — cheapest possible cache invalidation profile.
